objects.role: Business logic object that analyzes sales call transcripts against a rubric, scores them, and routes feedback to the appropriate outputs

objects.behavior: When a call payload arrives, analyze the transcript against the sales call effectiveness rubric covering dimensions such as discovery, objection handling, next steps, rapport, and value articulation — score the call out of 30. Send the feedback record to the call-feedback-log write service. Send a feedback summary Slack message to the sales-rep-notifier. If the score is below 15, also send the summarized feedback to the sales-manager-notifier.

objects.role: Business logic object that analyzes Slack bug report content and transforms it into a structured GitHub issue with title, description, and appropriate labels.

When the structured issue is ready, send it to github-issues and also send the Slack thread reference and a pending-confirmation record to bug-reports-channel once the issue is created. objects.role: Entry-point service object representing the Jotform self-service portal that receives employee verification letter requests.
objects.state_description: Records submitted verification requests including employee ID, requester details, and submission timestamp.
objects.behavior: When an employee submits a verification letter request through the portal, forward the request payload to the verification-request-processor peer. Record the submission in state.

peers.relationship: Forward the full request payload (employee ID, requester details, purpose) when a new verification request is submitted.

objects.role: Read service representing the Workday HRIS system that provides employee data on demand.
objects.behavior: Responds to queries for employee records including name, title, department, start date, employment status, and manager. When answering queries, call the `workday_hris_data` tool to retrieve data.

objects.role: Business logic object that orchestrates employment verification by applying document generation rules and routing logic.
objects.state_description: Tracks in-flight verification requests with employee data, document generation status, approval status, and delivery status.
objects.behavior: When a verification request arrives from the jotform-portal, query workday-hris for the employee's current employment details (name, title, department, hire date, employment status, salary if requested). Once employee data is received, send the compiled employee data and request context to docusign-document-generator to produce the formatted letter on company letterhead. When the approved document notification arrives from docusign-approval-workflow, send the approved document and employee email address to email-delivery to deliver the letter to the employee. If employee data cannot be found in Workday, do not proceed and log the failure in state.

peers.relationship: Query for employee record using employee ID when a new verification request is received.
Send compiled employee data and request details to generate the formatted verification letter.
Send the approved document and employee email address to deliver the final letter when approval is confirmed.

objects.role: Write service representing DocuSign's document generation capability that creates formatted employment verification letters using the company letterhead template.
objects.state_description: Records generated documents with document ID, employee ID, generation timestamp, and template used.
objects.behavior: When employee data and request context are received, generate a professionally formatted employment verification letter using the standard company letterhead template in DocuSign. Route the generated document to the HR Manager for review and approval via DocuSign's approval workflow. Record the document ID and metadata in state. Forward the document to docusign-approval-workflow for HR Manager review.

peers.relationship: Route the generated document to the HR Manager for review and approval immediately after document creation.

objects.role: Dual-role service object representing DocuSign's approval workflow that routes documents to the HR Manager and captures approval decisions.
objects.state_description: Tracks documents under review with HR Manager assignment, review status, approval or rejection decision, and timestamps.
objects.behavior: When a document is received for review, assign it to the HR Manager via DocuSign's approval workflow and await their decision. Record the approval or rejection decision and timestamp in state. When the HR Manager approves the document, forward the approved document reference and employee details to verification-request-processor via peer message.

peers.relationship: Forward the approved document reference and employee email when the HR Manager approves the verification letter.

event_sources: external system: DocuSign approval decision event

objects.role: Write service representing the email delivery system that sends the approved verification letter to the requesting employee.
objects.state_description: Records sent emails with recipient address, document reference, delivery timestamp, and delivery status.
objects.behavior: When an approved document and recipient email address are received, send the employment verification letter to the employee via email. Record the delivery details and status in state.

steps.text: Employee Marcus Thompson submits an employment verification letter request through the Jotform self-service portal. Request details: Employee Name: Marcus Thompson, Employee ID: EMP-20847, Job Title: Senior Software Engineer, Department: Engineering, Employment Start Date: March 15, 2019, Requester Email: marcus.thompson@company.com, Purpose of Verification: Mortgage Application, Salary Disclosure Requested: Yes.

expect.action: The Jotform self-service portal records a submitted verification request containing employee name 'Marcus Thompson', employee ID 'EMP-20847', job title 'Senior Software Engineer', department 'Engineering', employment start date 'March 15, 2019', requester email 'marcus.thompson@company.com', purpose 'Mortgage Application', salary disclosure requested 'Yes', and the submission timestamp; AND Workday HRIS is queried via the `workday_hris_data` tool for employee record 'EMP-20847' to retrieve current employment details including name, title, department, hire date, employment status, manager, and salary because salary disclosure was requested; AND DocuSign generates a professionally formatted employment verification letter on the standard company letterhead for Marcus Thompson and records the generated document with a document ID, employee ID 'EMP-20847', generation timestamp, and template used; AND DocuSign's approval workflow creates a review item assigned to the HR Manager for that document and records the review status plus the eventual approval decision and timestamp; AND if the HR Manager approves the document, an email is sent to marcus.thompson@company.com with the approved employment verification letter attached or linked, and the email delivery system records the recipient address, document reference, delivery timestamp, and delivery status.
expect.reason: The Jotform submission triggers the verification-request-processor to fetch Marcus Thompson's HR data from Workday, have DocuSign generate and route the letter for HR Manager approval, and upon approval send the completed verification letter to the employee by email.
